programme.title: Moody Beasts
programme.desc: Viewers will find answers to questions about animals.They will learn why male moose become covered in their own urine, clownfish change sex, and the brown moose dies after mating.

programme.title: Secrets of The Zoo: The Wild Side
Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Dog Compilation 2025
programme.desc: The adventures of veterinarians from the Critter Fixers clinic.They help pets of all kinds.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In this episode we will look at, among others:a group of lions - the most social of the big cats.The Kalahari herd is overseen by two huge males.One of them decides to fight for dominance by attacking his rival.We will see their brutal duel.We will also witness a voracious hyena foraging for food.Individuals of this species can eat up to 18 kg of meat at one time.The program also includes a deer duel in the rut.We will also find out what effect testosterone has on the behavior of male African elephants.

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programme.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.

programme.title: Europe From Above 4
programme.desc: The creators of the series will present Scotland, Denmark, Serbia, Belgium, Bulgaria and Romania from a bird's eye view.They will use, among others, modern drones.Viewers will see the greatest cultural and geographical national treasures.They will see how tradition, engineering and nature have shaped these places.In the first episode they will go to Scotland.They will soar over the town of St Andrews and see how gardeners look after the famous golf course.In East Lothian they will see natural treasures, including honey bees feasting on heather flowers.They will then investigate an ambitious engineering project that harnesses the power of the ocean to generate electricity.A team of archaeologists will reconstruct a traditional Scottish house.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: The creators of the series discover the majesty of the most interesting national parks located in the USA.They attract millions of tourists from all over the world.You can admire breathtaking landscapes from popular viewpoints.Viewers will see the beauty of eight national parks from a less obvious perspective.They will move not only to the famous Grand Canyon, but also to less familiar places.They will learn about the guards' favorite places and what makes each of these protected areas so special.They will also see what animals live in these places and what their life is like in the bosom of nature.The latest technologies were used to produce the series, including:drones and cameras with telephoto lenses A visit to the most spectacular places in the United States.It was in this country that the first official national park in the world - Yellowstone - was created in 1872.Documentarians combined spectacular photos with engaging narration and music, creating a story about magical places and their inhabitants.In subsequent episodes, they discover the secrets of, among others, Badlands National Park in South Dakota and volcanic Hawaii.The beginning of their expedition is the park, whose unique landscape attracts approximately six million tourists from all over the world every year.Rocks teeming with life Grand Canyon National Park was established in 1919.Characteristic layers in the rock formations provide insight into the history of the Earth dating back millions of years.California condors nest here.Each of them is marked and monitored by scientists who managed to recreate the disappearing population.Cameras follow the growth of one of the predatory chicks - from hatching to its first flight.Viewers will watch the hunting of a fawn puma and an Arizona heloderma.They meet the inhabitants of the forest-covered Kaibab Plateau.They will see why the monumental rocks of the canyon were a sacred place for Indian tribes.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom: Uprising
programme.desc: The film is dedicated to a lion named Sekekama.He is the undisputed leader of the pack.However, to maintain power, he must defend his throne against his rivals.These are three eastern princes who want to rule the entire territory.They are ready to overthrow the current king, and each of them may pose a real threat to his position.A new, powerful empire is also created by the dangerous Queens of the North.Three lionesses were once expelled from the pride, and now they tirelessly plan bloody revenge on their enemies.Meanwhile, the lioness Saba struggles with a personal tragedy.At the same time, she constantly works to ensure that the only son she has will follow the path she has set.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: For two years, National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory closely studied the tight-knit communities of some of the world's most intelligent penguins.He documented behaviors and situations that had previously been difficult to capture on camera.The series proves that penguins are much closer to humans than was previously known.These unique flightless birds are brave and adventurous, and at the same time value family bonds and friendship.Thanks to their ingenuity, they can survive in the most extreme conditions 20 years have passed since the premiere of the Oscar-winning "March of the Penguins".The three-part documentary series rediscovers the world of the inhabitants of the most hostile regions of the world.Today, groundbreaking technologies and scientific work allow us to look at flightless birds from a previously unavailable perspective.One of the guides to the penguin kingdom is Bertie Gregory, who camped with the team near the emperor penguin colony in Antarctica.The superhuman effort resulted in the recording of scenes that humans had never seen before.The most important thing is family. The first heroes of the bird saga are the largest representatives of the family - emperor penguins.For the first time, a television crew recorded an astonishing acrobatic display with their participation: hundreds of chicks of this species jumping from a 50-meter cliff into the icy ocean.Researchers also looked at the bonds between families, friends and strangers.In extreme conditions, social skills mean the difference between life and death.The cameras also included rockhopper, gentoo and golden-crested penguins.Filmmakers have discovered surprising behaviors of animals that can cooperate, take risks and even rebel.

programme.title: America The Beautiful Compilations
programme.sub-title: The wild heart of the country

programme.title: Growing up Animal
programme.desc: Viewers meet adolescent animals of various species from distant corners of the world.They will see how they develop in the mother's womb, come into the world and struggle with the first challenges in life.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In this episode we will look at, among others:a group of lions - the most social of the big cats.The Kalahari herd is overseen by two huge males.One of them decides to fight for dominance by attacking his rival.We will see their brutal duel.We will also witness a voracious hyena foraging for food.Individuals of this species can eat up to 18 kg of meat at one time.The program also includes a deer duel in the rut.We will also find out what effect testosterone has on the behavior of male African elephants.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Season 7
programme.desc: Tornadoes, downpours and other dangerous weather phenomena recorded in various parts of the world will be presented.Dramatic witness recordings prove how unpredictable nature can be.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 11 Compilations
programme.desc: The adventures of Dr. Pol's team, dealing with patients of various species.From chihuahuas to chinchillas, from cows to alligators, from alpacas to camels - every animal will get help.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 11 Compilations
programme.desc: The adventures of Dr. Pol's team, dealing with patients of various species.From chihuahuas to chinchillas, from cows to alligators, from alpacas to camels - every animal will get help.

programme.title: Incredible Dr. Pol 7
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the lives of many animals.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: Incredible Dr. Pol 7
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the lives of many animals.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr Pol 4
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He uses his knowledge and skills to help pet owners in the Michigan region.He is supported by trained colleagues.

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programme.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.

programme.title: Europe From Above 4
programme.desc: The creators of the series will present Scotland, Denmark, Serbia, Belgium, Bulgaria and Romania from a bird's eye view.They will use, among others, modern drones.Viewers will see the greatest cultural and geographical national treasures.They will see how tradition, engineering and nature have shaped these places.In the first episode they will go to Scotland.They will soar over the town of St Andrews and see how gardeners look after the famous golf course.In East Lothian they will see natural treasures, including honey bees feasting on heather flowers.They will then investigate an ambitious engineering project that harnesses the power of the ocean to generate electricity.A team of archaeologists will reconstruct a traditional Scottish house.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: The creators of the series discover the majesty of the most interesting national parks located in the USA.They attract millions of tourists from all over the world.You can admire breathtaking landscapes from popular viewpoints.Viewers will see the beauty of eight national parks from a less obvious perspective.They will move not only to the famous Grand Canyon, but also to less familiar places.They will learn about the guards' favorite places and what makes each of these protected areas so special.They will also see what animals live in these places and what their life is like in the bosom of nature.The latest technologies were used to produce the series, including:drones and cameras with telephoto lenses A visit to the most spectacular places in the United States.It was in this country that the first official national park in the world - Yellowstone - was created in 1872.Documentarians combined spectacular photos with engaging narration and music, creating a story about magical places and their inhabitants.In subsequent episodes, they discover the secrets of, among others, Badlands National Park in South Dakota and volcanic Hawaii.The beginning of their expedition is the park, whose unique landscape attracts approximately six million tourists from all over the world every year.Rocks teeming with life Grand Canyon National Park was established in 1919.Characteristic layers in the rock formations provide insight into the history of the Earth dating back millions of years.California condors nest here.Each of them is marked and monitored by scientists who managed to recreate the disappearing population.Cameras follow the growth of one of the predatory chicks - from hatching to its first flight.Viewers will watch the hunting of a fawn puma and an Arizona heloderma.They meet the inhabitants of the forest-covered Kaibab Plateau.They will see why the monumental rocks of the canyon were a sacred place for Indian tribes.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations 3
programme.desc: Vernard and Terrence run a veterinary clinic in Georgia where they help animals of many species.Patients and their caregivers appreciate the commitment with which they approach each case.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: This time we will see how dangerous they are, among others:majestic grizzlies.The only threat to these powerful bears are other individuals of the same species.We will see a brutal clash of these extremely strong, massive animals.The program also includes big cats that do not tolerate other predators in their territory.A clever serval manages to outsmart the fast cheetahs.We will also look at how the venomous Levantine viper attacks.This episode also includes scenes from Madagascar - a herd of lemurs defends access to food.

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programme.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.

programme.title: Europe From Above 4
programme.desc: The Old Continent seen from an extraordinary perspective.A bird's eye view will allow you to discover architectural treasures as well as natural gems.Europe will also be shown during different seasons.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: The creators of the series discover the majesty of the most interesting national parks located in the USA.They attract millions of tourists from all over the world.You can admire breathtaking landscapes from popular viewpoints.Viewers will see the beauty of eight national parks from a less obvious perspective.They will move not only to the famous Grand Canyon, but also to less familiar places.They will learn about the guards' favorite places and what makes each of these protected areas so special.They will also see what animals live in these places and what their life is like in the bosom of nature.The latest technologies were used to produce the series, including:drones and cameras with telephoto lenses.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Nothing will stop ruthless predators on their way to their prey.Their survival depends on large herds of animals that have been coming to the same place year after year for millennia to quench their thirst.Lions, leopards and hyenas know perfectly well that they will not survive if they do not engage in a fierce fight to the death.The creators of the series will show this fight from a different perspective.They will present the brutal world of animals from both the predator and the prey perspective.Viewers will witness a bloody struggle for power against the background of beautiful African landscapes.They will learn the motives behind every move of the fighters and see that it is a world where no one stays on top forever, and only the strongest survive.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: For two years, National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory closely studied the tight-knit communities of some of the world's most intelligent penguins.He documented behaviors and situations that had previously been difficult to capture on camera.The series proves that penguins are much closer to humans than was previously known.These unique flightless birds are brave and adventurous, and at the same time value family bonds and friendship.Thanks to their ingenuity, they can survive in the most extreme conditions.

programme.title: America the Beautiful: Mighty Northwest
programme.desc: The Cascade Mountains located in the USA are among the most dangerous regions in North America.Among their peaks you can find as many as 13 volcanoes, 7 of which have erupted in the last 300 years.

programme.title: Growing up Animal
programme.desc: Viewers meet adolescent animals of various species from distant corners of the world.They will see how they develop in the mother's womb, come into the world and struggle with the first challenges in life.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: This time we will see how dangerous they are, among others:majestic grizzlies.The only threat to these powerful bears are other individuals of the same species.We will see a brutal clash of these extremely strong, massive animals.The program also includes big cats that do not tolerate other predators in their territory.A clever serval manages to outsmart the fast cheetahs.We will also look at how the venomous Levantine viper attacks.This episode also includes scenes from Madagascar - a herd of lemurs defends access to food.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Season 7
programme.desc: Tornadoes, downpours and other dangerous weather phenomena recorded in various parts of the world will be presented.Dramatic witness recordings prove how unpredictable nature can be.
